_comment: Add/remove ebook objects here. 'cover' is optional — omit it and the card falls back to a plain colour block with the title. 'link' can be a Google Drive share link (use the /preview format for a clean inline viewer in a new tab) or any direct file URL.
title: Essential 333
description: A new, efficient way to learn Barron's 333 words — through story and real implementation, not rote memorization.
